executive_summary: Acme Manufacturing Ltd is implementing an end-to-end invoice automation system to eliminate manual data entry, reduce processing errors from 15% to below 1%, and cut invoice cycle time from 5-7 days to same-day processing. This BRD captures the agreed requirements from the April 2026 requirements workshop.

scope_summary.description: OCR-based capture via email, scan, and portal
PO matching and GL posting via SAP FI
Email and SMS alerts at workflow stages

requirements.description: The system shall capture invoices via three channels: email attachment, flatbed scan, and vendor portal upload, using OCR to extract header and line-item data automatically.
requirements.context: Currently staff manually key data from paper invoices. OCR must achieve >95% field extraction accuracy. Supported formats: PDF, TIFF, JPG.
requirements.technical_comments: Evaluate Microsoft Azure Form Recognizer or ABBYY FlexiCapture for OCR engine.

requirements.description: The system shall route invoices through a 3-level approval workflow: Team Lead → Finance Manager → CFO (for invoices above INR 1 lakh), with configurable threshold rules.
requirements.context: Approval thresholds: < INR 10,000 = auto-approve; INR 10,000 – 1L = Team Lead only; > INR 1L = all 3 levels. Each approver has 24-hour SLA.
requirements.technical_comments: Implement as Dynamics 365 approval flow or Power Automate workflow.

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with SAP ERP (FI module) to perform 3-way PO matching and post approved invoices directly to GL accounts without manual intervention.
requirements.context: SAP version: S/4HANA 2021. Integration via RFC/BAPI or REST API. PO matching: invoice qty and amount vs. GRN and PO tolerance ±3%.
requirements.technical_comments: SAP middleware team must expose BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE. Plan API discovery workshop in Week 2.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a vendor self-service portal where vendors can submit invoices, check approval status, and view payment dates without contacting the finance team.
requirements.context: Approximately 350 active vendors. Portal must support bulk invoice upload (up to 50 invoices per batch). Vendors authenticate via email OTP.
requirements.technical_comments: Build as Power Pages (formerly Power Apps Portals) connected to Dynamics 365.

requirements.description: The system shall send automated email and SMS notifications to the relevant approver and invoice submitter at each stage transition (received, approved, rejected, queried, paid).
requirements.context: Current system sends ad-hoc emails only. New system must support templated notifications with invoice number, amount, and action link. SMS via Twilio or similar.
requirements.technical_comments: Use Power Automate connector for Office 365 email and Twilio for SMS.

requirements.description: The system shall handle invoice exceptions (PO mismatch, duplicate invoice, missing GRN) by routing them to a dedicated exceptions queue with automated alerts to the responsible buyer.
requirements.context: Current exception rate is ~8%. Exception types: PO not found, quantity mismatch >3%, duplicate invoice number, GRN not received. Buyer must resolve within 48 hours.
requirements.technical_comments: Build exception queue as a Dynamics 365 queue. Configure tolerance rules as configurable parameters.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a real-time reporting dashboard showing invoice processing KPIs: volume by status, average cycle time, approval bottlenecks, and payment due calendar.
requirements.context: Dashboard must be accessible to Finance Manager and CFO. Refresh: real-time for status counts, daily for trend charts. Export to Excel and PDF.
requirements.technical_comments: Implement using Power BI embedded in Dynamics 365. Dataset sourced from Dataverse.

requirements.description: The system shall maintain a complete, immutable audit trail for all invoice lifecycle events, with 7-year retention to meet statutory compliance requirements.
requirements.context: Audit log must capture: event type, timestamp, user ID, IP address, old/new values. Must be exportable for internal and external audit purposes.
requirements.technical_comments: Store audit logs in Azure Blob Storage (immutable policy). Integrate with Dynamics 365 audit log framework.

requirements.description: The system shall enforce role-based access control with at least four roles: Invoice Submitter, Approver, Finance Admin, and System Admin. Each role to have clearly defined permissions.
requirements.context: Current access control is unstructured. New RBAC matrix to be defined in detail design phase. Roles to be managed via Azure AD groups.
requirements.technical_comments: Leverage Dynamics 365 security roles and Azure AD group-based assignment.

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with the bank payment gateway to initiate approved payments automatically, with same-day payment for invoices approved before 2pm and next-day for after.
requirements.context: Bank: HDFC Corporate Banking API. Payment formats: NEFT, RTGS, IMPS. Cut-off time 2pm IST. Requires dual authorisation (checker/maker) for payments above INR 5L.
requirements.technical_comments: HDFC API credentials to be obtained by Finance team. Build payment initiation as a separate service with dual-auth workflow.

scope_checklist.description: Capture invoices from monitored email inbox via OCR
Capture invoices from MFD scanner via OCR
Vendor uploads invoice PDF via self-service portal
Route to Team Lead / Manager / CFO based on amount
3-way PO match: invoice vs GRN vs PO
Post approved invoices to GL accounts in SAP
Vendor submits and tracks invoices online
Real-time KPI dashboard for Finance team

brd_scope.sub_part: Email and SMS at workflow transitions

out_of_scope.item: Integration with non-SAP legacy ERP systems

scope_definitions.description: All channels and methods for receiving and digitising supplier invoices into the system
Automated routing and approval of invoices based on configurable threshold and role rules
Bi-directional integration with SAP S/4HANA FI module for PO matching and GL posting
Web portal for vendors to submit invoices, track status, and view payment schedules
Automated email and SMS alerts triggered at each invoice lifecycle stage
Real-time dashboard, KPI reporting, and immutable audit trail for compliance
